title: What Frontier AI Engineering Is
shortSummary: Map the real job: turning powerful models into usable, reliable products and platform systems.
whyItMatters: Most people still confuse frontier AI engineering with research, prompt hobbyism, or classical ML. This module gives you the operating definition for the roles that labs and top startups actually hire: product engineers, platform engineers, eval engineers, and research-to-production builders.
coreConcepts: The blended product-plus-platform shape of a frontier AI engineer
How AI product engineers differ from researchers, ML engineers, and pure backend developers
Why evals, retrieval, tool use, latency, and reliability matter as much as model choice
Where classical ML and robotics fit as secondary tracks instead of the default path
What hiring managers at frontier labs actually look for in portfolios and interviews
